name: Beef and Sausage Loaf- Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the ground beef, mushrooms with liquid, pork sausage, beaten egg, bread crumbs, onion salt, celery, garlic salt, and horseradish.
2. Shape the mixture into a loaf by rounding the top of the mixture.
3. Place the shaped loaf in the crockpot.
4. Cook on LOW for 9-10 hours.
